title: ModelEngine-Group/nexent
description: Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

title: bytedance/deer-flow
description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

Changes since langchain-core==1.4.0

release(core): 1.4.1 (#37922)

ci(infra): harden Dependabot version-bound preservation (#37510)

title: A Taxonomy of Runtime Faults in Model Context Protocol Servers
description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) enables LLMs (Large Language Models) to interact with external tools and data sources via a standardized protocol. Its rapid adoption in tool-augmented Artificial Intelligence (AI) workflows has introduced new reliability challenges, such as configuration parameters that are accepted but not enforced at runtime, leading to unintended default behavior, whose runtime fau
authors: Joshua Owotogbe, Indika Kumara, Willem-Jan van den Heuvel

title: Description-Code Inconsistency in Real-world MCP Servers: Measurement, Detection, and Security Implications
description: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has emerged as a critical standard empowering Large Language Models (LLMs) to utilize external tools. In this ecosystem, LLMs rely on natural language descriptions provided by MCP servers to select and execute functions. This interaction implicitly assumes that tool descriptions faithfully reflect their underlying implementations, while this assumption is not manda
authors: Yutao Shi, Xiaohan Zhang, Xiangjing Zhang

title: Stop Using Claude Code - by Mil Hoornaert
description: Claude CodeはAIコーディング用ハーネスとして最悪で、代替案を推奨。
